description_long: This street light features a tall, slender, and smoothly curved pole with a minimalist design, finished in a matte black color. The pole rises vertically before bending at a right angle to support a streamlined, modern lamp head. The lamp head is elongated and teardrop-shaped, with a slightly tapered end and a smooth, unadorned surface, suggesting a contemporary LED fixture. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments on the pole, emphasizing a utilitarian and modern aesthetic. The base of the pole is slightly wider, likely for stability and secure ground mounting. This type of street light is commonly found along urban sidewalks, streets, and parks, providing focused downward illumination.
description: A tall, modern street light with a smooth, curved black pole and a streamlined, teardrop-shaped lamp head, designed for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full height and elegant curve of the pole, with the lamp head extending horizontally.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the pole as a thin vertical line and the lamp head as a small oval at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the curve and lamp head from the other direction.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the pole as a straight line and the lamp head as a narrow shape at the end.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, streamlined teardrop-shaped lamp head with a smooth, unadorned surface and no visible decorative elements or diffusers.
